title: Boss Takedown
description: A complex modpack mainly based arround equipement and killing loads of bosses
body:
In Boss Takedown, your objective is to eliminate all bosses of the modpack. (it includes bosses of Bosses Of Mass Destruction, for exemple)

It also includes mods to help you fight thoses bosses as well as improve your stuff (like Advanced Netherite, for exemple)

May you beat those bosses.

![Boss Takedown 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf3438a9ff3f60cb589627e74d21297a8b3687d3.jpeg)

![Boss Takedown 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4569ff2a0a860d4da9fcd9c8d8304c5c009b9143.jpeg)

![Boss Takedown 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/240a96142af4dcaf75a9a616029c863d729cd7db.jpeg)

![Boss Takedown 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdf82146c1fb8b14005308af9aec7140a228e5e5.jpeg)

![Boss Takedown 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a954389686a4abd4db502a5504540577da9ea107.jpeg)

![Boss Takedown 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ea324cde00af55e1ba9c9bf873818ea64570115.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
